message:
feat(render-term): add UML class diagram three-compartment rendering

When a class diagram node has class_meta (attributes and/or methods),
the terminal renderer now displays a UML-style three-compartment box:

  ┌──────────┐
  │ ClassName │  ← centered header
  ├──────────┤
  │ +name    │  ← attributes with visibility symbols
  │ -age     │
  ├──────────┤
  │ +eat()   │  ← methods with visibility symbols
  └──────────┘

Features:
- Visibility symbols: + (public), - (private), # (protected), ~ (package)
- Abstract suffix (*) and static suffix ($) displayed
- Return type annotations shown after method name
- Horizontal separator lines between compartments using ├/┤ tee glyphs
- Graceful truncation when box is too small for all members
- Falls back to simple label rendering for nodes without class_meta

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
